candidate_definition_hints.text: Bash language server that brings an IDE-like experience for bash scripts to most editors. This is based on the [Tree Sitter parser][tree-sitter-bash] and supports [explainshell][explainshell], [shellcheck][shellcheck] and [shfmt][shfmt].
